chunks.title: Death of Saul and His Sons
chunks.reason: Describes the battle at Mount Gilboa where Saul and his sons fall in combat.

chunks.title: Philistine Treatment of the Dead
chunks.reason: Details the Philistines stripping Saul's body and displaying it in Beth-shan.

chunks.title: Recovery of Saul's Remains
chunks.reason: Narrates the men of Jabesh-gilead retrieving the bodies and burying them.
